prompt: An ultra-realistic, cinematic portrait of a beautiful young East Asian woman with a messy high bun and soft, loose tendrils framing her face. She is looking directly into the camera with a neutral, serene expression. She is wearing a thick, textured grey knit scarf wrapped around her neck and a matching chunky knit cardigan over a tan button-up shirt. She is holding a wooden serving tray presenting a massive, gourmet bacon cheeseburger with melted cheddar, crisp lettuce, and a sesame seed bun, alongside a brown paper container overflowing with golden, crispy french fries. In the background, a rustic, softly blurred cozy cafe interior with warm, ambient bokeh lighting. Shot on a 50mm lens, DSLR quality, shallow depth of field, rich textures, natural soft lighting, 8k resolution.
